error_anchors_before: [W513 09:36:22.218580616 compiler_depend.ts:577] Warning: NPU warning, error code is 507035[Error]: | [Error]: The vector core execution is abnormal. | EH9999: Inner Error! | rtDeviceSynchronizeWithTimeout execute failed, reason=[vector core exception][FUN
natural_language: When NPU vector core exception (error code 507035, "rtDeviceSynchronizeWithTimeout execute failed, reason=[vector core exception]") occurs, do not use ALIGN_ELEMS=2048, HARD_CAP_ELEMS=8192, and maxTile=UB_BUDGET_BYTES/24; instead set ALIGN_ELEMS=16, HARD_CAP_ELEMS=4096, and maxTile=UB_BUDGET_BYTES/28 to allocate tiles within the UB budget.
